title: NewSuperWoodenSword
description: This is destructive effect mod,added some items and commands that may not suitable for generation and use.
body:
# English
This Mod is an artifact mod.This mod does not have a composition table, and the weapons inside are very excessive and not suitable for generation and use. The weapon inside is very high damage, can kill almost any creature what you want to kill. This weapon also has a disarming weapon, which, as the name suggests, once in your hands you can't throw away,and other mods can't modify the weapons,too,it won't be cleared in the inventory.
There are weapons, cool fonts, right click kills, cool colored lightning in this mod.
There are some useful commands too:

1. /super-kill <target(s)>

This command will kill entities through the code inside the weapons that this mod provided,and not use the weapons itself.



2.zero-player-items <player(s)>

This command will drop player(s)'s inventory(s) through the code inside the weapons that this mod provided,and not use the weapons itself.



3.sws-lighting (enable|rainbow <value>:alpha)

This command can set whether the weapons if summon lighting bolts or not and if enable the rainbow effect for lighting bolts.

This command can set the lighting bolts's render alpha when the rainbow effect is enabled.



4.sws-clear-mode (true|false|toggle)

This command can set whether the weapons enables the clear mode or not.

When the clear mode was enabled,the weapons' lighting bolts won't be summoned, and all the entities what were attacked by the weapons will cast to the dead (living) entity,the worlds will be casted to the clear world that all entities without the weapons thiat this mod provided will be removed.



5.sws-clear-debug

This command is used for debugging.

This command will force send clear signal to all the players and cast the client and server worlds to the clear world that all entities without the weapons thiat this mod provided will be removed.



6.sws-item-hue

(item_hue_enable|item_hue_base|item_hue_step|item_hue_offsetX|item_hue_offsetY|item_hue_saturation) (value)

Notice: This command is CLIENT SIDE ONLY.

This command can set whether the weapons' deseribe enables the custom font or not and some configuration about the font's render.



# 简体中文
此模组为一件神器模组。此模组没有合成表，其中的武器数量过多，不适合生成和使用。内部的武器威力极高，几乎可以杀死任何你想要击杀的生物。此外，该武器还配备有防缴械功能，顾名思义，一旦握在手中就无法丢弃，而且其他模组也无法修改这些武器，也不会从物品栏中清除掉。
此模组中有武器、酷炫的字体、右键攻击、酷炫的彩色闪电。
此外还有一些有用的指令：

1. /super-kill <target(s)>

此指令将通过本模组所提供的武器内部的代码来摧毁实体，而非直接使用这些武器本身。



2.zero-player-item <players（s）>

此指令会通过本模组所提供的武器内部的代码来删除玩家的装备栏内容，而非直接使用这些武器本身。



3.sws-lighting（enable|rainbow <value>：alpha）

此命令可以设定是否让武器发射闪电，以及是否开启闪电的彩虹效果。

此命令可在彩虹效果启用时设置光柱的渲染透明度。



4.sws-clear-mode（true|false|toggle）

此命令可设置武器是否启用清除模式。

当清除模式启用时，武器的闪电将不会被召唤，所有被武器攻击的实体将被转换为死亡（存活的）实体，世界将转换为清除世界，即所有未使用此模组提供的武器的实体都将被移除。



5.sws-clear-debug

此命令用于调试。

此命令会强制向所有玩家发送清除信号，并将客户端和服务器世界转换为清除世界，即所有未使用此模组提供的武器的实体都将被移除。



6.sws-item-hue
（item_hue_enable|item_hue_base|item_hue_step|item_hue_offsetX|item_hue_offsetY|item_hue_saturation）（value）

注意：此命令仅限客户端使用。

此命令可决定武器描述中是否启用自定义字体，以及有关字体显示的一些设置。
